deviations.description: Symmetric-pair (2 challengers) scoped to actor-only for forge-bootstrap typescript skill review. Rationale: forge-bootstrap is one-file admission gate, not build-team work.
Symmetric-pair (2 challengers each for ari + noor) scoped to 1 challenger total (jade reviewing ari only). Phase 1 spawns: 2 actors + 1 challenger = 3 spawns (vs policy 6).

/chaos-test NOT invoked; substituted single 12-security-engineer.vlad spawn. Audit was substantively adversarial but missing the brief's 4-actor minimum (hacker / code-reviewer / architect / honesty-auditor).

Most contract personas (06–16, 01, 02, 05) lack Agent definition files. Spawned via `general-purpose` + persona embedded in prompt instead of via dedicated agent type. Affects: noor, evan, chen, casey.

evan's TDD test suite (11 tests) was authored tests-first and traced-green offline, but `npm install` + `npm test` were blocked by env constraints. Phase 4 chaos audit ran via `npm audit` on installed node_modules (which was somehow populated — DRIFT-014).
